one_line: Pure BW + one shocking primary. Mono OR oversized display sans. Asymmetric, sharp, deliberate. Feels like bzzt.dev, Are.na, Cabinet studio, current-design.studio.

background.role: Pure white — brutalism uses pure colors deliberately.

surface.role: Same as bg. No layered surfaces in this aesthetic.

surface_subtle.role: Rare — used for inset blocks that need separation.

text_primary.role: Pure black. Brutalism is fine with pure black/white extremes.

text_secondary.role: Used very sparingly — most text is text_primary.

accent_shocking.role: PICK ONE shocking primary per project: orange (default), red (#FF0000), yellow (#FFE600), blue (#0017FF), green (#00CC00). This is the ONLY non-BW color.

rules: Pure black + pure white + ONE shocking primary. Three colors, period.
The accent is SHOCKING — high saturation, no muting. The point is that it's louder than every other profile
Pick ONE accent per project: orange, red, yellow, blue, or green. Mixing two accents kills the brutalist purity
Borders are BLACK. 2-4px thick. They're a primary visual element, not a subtle divider

display.family: Inter Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial Black, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
display.rule: OVERSIZED, BOLD. Hero headlines at 80-160px, weight 800+. Tight tracking. This is the loud half of the aesthetic.

body.family: Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, system-ui, sans-serif

mono_brutal.family: Berkeley Mono, JetBrains Mono, Söhne Mono, ui-monospace, monospace
use_for: ALTERNATIVE PRIMARY FONT — some brutalist sites use mono for everything, not display sans. Pick one approach per project.
mono_brutal.rule: Two valid brutalist directions: (a) oversized display sans, mono labels — like Cabinet. (b) Mono everything — like Are.na. Pick one.

scale.$rule: Ratios are MORE EXTREME — small things stay small, big things go HUGE. Hero can be 7-10x body size.

rules: Hero headlines go to 88-180px on desktop. NOT subtle.
Body stays small (14-16px). The contrast between huge headlines and tiny body is the brutalist signature
ALL CAPS labels in mono at 10-12px are correct here (and basically nowhere else)
Tracking: very tight on display (-0.04em), normal on body, very wide on tiny caps (+0.1em)
DRAMATIC spacing — sections can be 200-320px apart vertically
OR they can crash into each other — brutalism allows intentional collision. Pick a stance
Grid is often VISIBLE — show grid lines as part of the design
ZERO RADIUS. Almost everything. Sharp corners are the brutalist signature.
Buttons: 0 radius. Inputs: 0 radius. Cards: 0 radius. Even modals.
NO shadows. Brutalism uses pure flat colors and thick borders, never depth tricks
Cards are defined by 2-4px black borders, not shadow
Hover states: invert the colors (white text on black bg), or shift the position (transform: translate(2px, 2px) to simulate a 'press')

button_primary.color: background (white or black depending on contrast)
button_primary.rule: Buttons are LOUD. Thick border, all-caps label, big padding, sharp edges. Often with a (transform: translate(0,0) → translate(4px,4px) on press) effect.

input_text.rule: Inputs are bottom-border-only, brutalist underline-style. NO rounded box around the input.

card.rule: Thick black border, sharp corners, white interior. The opposite of soft.

agency_landing.structure: Visible grid. Hero takes ~70% of viewport with hyper-large headline (5xl-6xl). Asymmetric — text might be left-aligned and unjustified, headline might overflow visually. ONE accent color block somewhere on the page.
do: Number sections explicitly (01, 02, 03 in mono labels)
Use the accent color for ONE big block, not 10 small accents

portfolio_grid.structure: Grid of project tiles. Tiles can be DIFFERENT sizes (deliberate, not responsive). Each tile: project title + 1-line description + tag in mono.
do: Click area is the WHOLE tile

case_study.structure: Single column, max-width 800px. Title at top in oversized display (60-80px). Body in 14-16px serif or sans (pick one and stick). Pull quotes set in HUGE display sans, 80-120px.
do: Use accent color sparingly — one block, one quote highlight, that's it
Asymmetric image placement (full-bleed image, then small caption indented)

animations.philosophy: SNAP. Instant. Or position shifts to simulate a brutalist 'press'.

patterns.hover: Invert colors (text and bg swap), 0ms transition. Instant.
patterns.button_press: transform: translate(4px, 4px) on active to simulate stamp-press.
patterns.OPTIONAL_only_if_intentional: Marquee-style infinite scroll for one banner section (decorative, brutalist trope).

anti_patterns: easings of any kind on UI elements
